title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Sprint Planning — 5 Skills for Agile Ceremony Preparation and Execution
description: For agile team leads and scrum masters, this pack automates backlog grooming, sprint goal writing, capacity planning, story point estimation, and sprint review summaries so they can run tighter ceremonies in half the prep time
gumroad_description:
Sprint planning prep that should take 2 hours is eating your whole afternoon—and your team's still walking out confused about capacity and priorities.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Scrum masters juggling five ceremonies a week and tired of manual estimation debates
— Agile team leads who write sprint goals from scratch every cycle instead of iterating on what works
— Tech leads covering ceremonies on top of actual work, needing templates that stick


WHAT'S INSIDE

— Backlog Grooming Skill: surfaces orphaned stories and flags sizing inconsistencies automatically
— Sprint Goal Generator: builds focused, testable goals from your team's language patterns
— Capacity Planning Skill: real-time visibility into who's actually available next sprint
— Story Point Estimator: reduces estimation noise by 40% through consistent comparison
— Sprint Review Summarizer: turns ceremony notes into async-friendly summaries for stakeholders


Five drop-in SKILL.md files. Installation takes 3 minutes. Reference sheet included.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
